children.name: test_all_low_risk_scenarios[Atier_high_income]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Atier_high_income', 'input_file': 'low_risk/case_01/input.json', 'output_file': 'low_risk/case_01/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'No mention of any significant risks, all risk factors should be low severity.'}

children.name: test_all_low_risk_scenarios[Atier_lower_income]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Atier_lower_income', 'input_file': 'low_risk/case_02/input.json', 'output_file': 'low_risk/case_02/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'Allow mentions of the lower income but all risk factors should be low severity.'}

children.name: test_all_low_risk_scenarios[Atier_AboveMaxDTI]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Atier_AboveMaxDTI', 'input_file': 'low_risk/case_03/input.json', 'output_file': 'low_risk/case_03/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should mention that the DtI ratio exceeds the maximum allowed for Tier A applicants as per policy. Other risk factors should be low severity'}

children.name: test_all_low_risk_scenarios[Atier_Over110LTV]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Atier_Over110LTV', 'input_file': 'low_risk/case_04/input.json', 'output_file': 'low_risk/case_04/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'There should be a mention that the LTV exceeds 110% which is not allowed as per policy. Other risk factors should be low severity'}
